title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.450 - Assessment lists to be filed with county clerk
text:
137.450.  Assessment lists to be filed with county clerk. — He shall file with the county clerk, in alphabetical order, within the time prescribed by law, all of the assessment lists taken by him, which lists shall be kept by the clerk as now provided by law; provided, that all necessary blank lists, books and stationery shall be furnished by the county clerk, to be paid for out of the county treasury.
(RSMo 1939 § 14007) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12330; 1919 § 13243; 1909 § 11731
